name: White Bean Soup with Sage I.e.s.jjgf65a
recipeIngredient: Clear chicken broth, canned (14 ½ oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the onion.
2. Mince the garlic.
3. Peel and shred the carrot.
4. Dice the tomato (if using).
5. Mince the sage to measure 1 tbsp (or substitute with 1 tsp dried).
6. Heat oil in a large saucepan until hot.
7. Add onion, garlic, and shredded carrot; sauté until the onion is tender.
8. Stir in beans with liquid and chicken broth.
9. Stir in tomato and sage.
10. Bring to a boil and simmer for about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
11. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
12. Serve hot. Makes 4 servings.
